metadata.note: Questions rédigées manuellement par un expert, basées sur les 20 CONTRADICTS réels du KG. Questions qu'un consultant SAP poserait naturellement.

questions.question: Comment SAP Dispute Management communique-t-il entre les systèmes ? Utilise-t-il des appels synchrones ou asynchrones ?

claim1.text: SAP Dispute Management uses synchronous BAPI calls in a one-system scenario.

claim2.text: SAP Dispute Management uses asynchronous BAPI calls between the systems involved.

questions.question: Quel protocole de communication est utilisé entre le système Accounts Receivable et le Dispute Case Processing : BAPI ou RFC ?

claim1.text: This destination is used for synchronous and asynchronous BAPI calls from the Accounts Receivable system to the Dispute Case Processing system.

claim2.text: RFC calls take place from the Accounts Receivable system to the Dispute Case Processing system and vice versa in the ALE scenario of SAP Dispute Management.

questions.question: Dans quel cas les IDocs sont-ils envoyés au système Dispute Case Processing depuis Accounts Receivable ? Lors du clearing ou lors des paiements partiels ?

claim1.text: IDocs are sent to the Dispute Case Processing system from the Accounts Receivable system when items are cleared.

claim2.text: IDocs are sent to the Dispute Case Processing system from the Accounts Receivable system when partial payments are executed on items.

questions.question: Où sont stockées les données personnelles pour Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales ? Dans VLOGP ou dans PeriodEnd Valuation ?

claim1.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the Versioned Persistency of Logistics Pricing Data (VLOGP).

claim2.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the PeriodEnd Valuation (PEV).

questions.question: Les données personnelles du Commodity Procurement sont-elles gérées via BRFplus Decision Tables ou via Pricing Condition Records dans CPE Formula Assembly ?

claim1.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the BRFplus Decision Table Entries for CPE Formula Assembly.

claim2.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in Pricing Condition Records in CPE Formula Assembly.

questions.question: Comment la gestion des données personnelles a-t-elle évolué entre le Security Guide 2022 et 2023 pour le module Commodity Procurement ?

claim1.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the PeriodEnd Valuation (PEV).

claim2.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the Versioned Persistency of Logistics Pricing Data (VLOGP).

questions.question: Quel est le nom officiel du produit : SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition ou SAP Cloud ERP Private Edition ?

claim1.text: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition is the only analytics solution to bring together BI, Planning, and Predictive in the cloud

claim2.text: SAP Cloud ERP Private Edition is the only analytics solution to bring together BI, Planning, and Predictive in the cloud

questions.question: Le produit analytics qui combine BI, Planning et Predictive dans le cloud s'appelle-t-il encore S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition dans les documents récents ?

claim1.text: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition is the only analytics solution to bring together BI, Planning, and Predictive in the cloud

claim2.text: SAP Cloud ERP Private Edition is only available in SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition

questions.question: SAP Field Service Management s'intègre-t-il avec SAP ECC ou avec SAP S/4HANA via Cloud Integration ?

claim1.text: SAP Field Service Management enables field service organizations to integrate with SAP ECC software.

claim2.text: SAP Field Service Management is integrated with Service using SAP Cloud Integration and SAP Cloud Connector.

questions.question: Quels composants SAP supportent les logon tickets pour le Single Sign-On via navigateur web ?

claim1.text: ISF supports the use of logon tickets for SSO when using a Web browser as the front-end client.

claim2.text: SAP S/4HANA supports the use of logon tickets for SSO when using a Web browser as the front-end client.

questions.question: Le support SSO par logon tickets est-il spécifique à ISF ou à l'ensemble de SAP S/4HANA ?

claim1.text: ISF supports the use of logon tickets for SSO when using a Web browser as the front-end client.

claim2.text: SAP S/4HANA supports the use of logon tickets for SSO when using a Web browser as the front-end client.

questions.question: Cross-Application Time Sheet (CA-TS) et SAP E-Recruiting supportent-ils tous les deux le SSO par logon tickets ?

claim1.text: Cross-Application Time Sheet (CA-TS) supports the use of logon tickets for SSO when using a Web browser as the frontend client.

claim2.text: SAP E-Recruiting supports the use of logon tickets for SSO when using a Web browser as the frontend client.

questions.question: Dans le scénario SUMA, la procédure de planning du primary control cycle est-elle indépendante ou identique à celle du secondary control cycle ?

claim1.text: The type of planning procedure assigned to the primary control cycle is independent of the secondary control cycle's planning procedure.

claim2.text: Planning procedure assigned to the primary control cycle and secondary control cycles are the same in SUMA scenario.

questions.question: Comment fonctionne le replenishment planning pour un primary control cycle avec takt-based planning ? Le two-level replenishment est-il possible ?

claim1.text: For a primary control cycle with takt-based planning procedure, two-level replenishment planning through supermarket is possible.

claim2.text: Planning procedure assigned to the primary control cycle and secondary control cycles are the same in SUMA scenario.

questions.question: Quelles sont les différences entre les Security Guides 2022 et 2023 concernant la communication dans SAP Dispute Management ?

claim1.text: SAP Dispute Management uses synchronous BAPI calls in a one-system scenario.

claim2.text: RFC calls take place from the Accounts Receivable system to the Dispute Case Processing system and vice versa in the ALE scenario of SAP Dispute Management.

questions.question: La transaction CMM_DEL_DOC_VERSIONS est-elle liée à VLOGP ou à PeriodEnd Valuation pour Commodity Procurement ?

claim1.text: Transaction CMM_DEL_DOC_VERSIONS is used to display information about stored personal data in the versioned persistency of logistics pricing data (VLOGP) of Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales.

claim2.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the PeriodEnd Valuation (PEV).

questions.question: Quel est le sens des appels entre Accounts Receivable et Dispute Case Processing ? Unidirectionnel ou bidirectionnel ?

claim1.text: This destination is used for synchronous and asynchronous BAPI calls from the Accounts Receivable system to the Dispute Case Processing system.

claim2.text: There are calls from the Dispute Case Processing system to the system for Accounts Receivable Accounting.

questions.question: SAP Field Service Management nécessite-t-il SAP Cloud Connector pour l'intégration ou peut-il se connecter directement à ECC ?

claim1.text: SAP Field Service Management enables field service organizations to integrate with SAP ECC software.

claim2.text: SAP Field Service Management is integrated with Service using SAP Cloud Integration and SAP Cloud Connector.

questions.question: Comment les données personnelles sont-elles gérées entre les versions du Security Guide pour le module Commodity Sales ? Y a-t-il eu des changements ?

claim1.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the BRFplus Decision Table Entries for CPE Formula Assembly.

claim2.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the PeriodEnd Valuation (PEV).

questions.question: Quelle est la direction des communications IDoc dans le scénario ALE du Dispute Management ? Du système AR vers DCP ou l'inverse ?

claim1.text: IDocs are sent to the Dispute Case Processing system from the Accounts Receivable system when items are cleared.

claim2.text: IDocs are sent to the Dispute Case Processing system from the Accounts Receivable system when the clearing of items is reset.

questions.question: Y a-t-il des incohérences dans la documentation SAP concernant les méthodes d'intégration de SAP Dispute Management ?

claim1.text: SAP Dispute Management uses synchronous BAPI calls in a one-system scenario.

claim2.text: SAP Dispute Management uses asynchronous BAPI calls between the systems involved.

questions.question: Le renommage de S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition en Cloud ERP Private Edition a-t-il un impact sur les fonctionnalités analytics documentées ?

claim1.text: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition is the only analytics solution to bring together BI, Planning, and Predictive in the cloud

claim2.text: SAP Cloud ERP Private Edition is the only analytics solution to bring together BI, Planning, and Predictive in the cloud

questions.question: Quels modules SAP utilisent le SSO via logon tickets pour l'accès navigateur ? La liste est-elle la même entre les versions du Security Guide ?

claim1.text: ISF supports the use of logon tickets for SSO when using a Web browser as the front-end client.

claim2.text: SAP E-Recruiting supports the use of logon tickets for SSO when using a Web browser as the frontend client.

questions.question: Pour le scénario SUMA dans SAP Production Planning, le planning du control cycle primaire et secondaire doit-il être aligné ?

claim1.text: The type of planning procedure assigned to the primary control cycle is independent of the secondary control cycle's planning procedure.

claim2.text: Planning procedure assigned to the primary control cycle and secondary control cycles are the same in SUMA scenario.

questions.question: Quels changements y a-t-il eu entre les Security Guides 2022 et 2023 pour le stockage des données personnelles dans le module Commodity ?

claim1.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the Versioned Persistency of Logistics Pricing Data (VLOGP).

claim2.text: Commodity Procurement and Commodity Sales provide information about stored personal data in the BRFplus Decision Table Entries for CPE Formula Assembly.
